items.headline: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire
items.summary: Elon Musk is officially the world's first trillionaire following SpaceX's stock debut today, with the company's IPO price valuing his stake at nearly $870 billion on paper.

items.headline: Former Tesla board member issues candid message on SpaceX stock
items.summary: Venture capitalist Steve Westly says SpaceX is "three moonshots in one company" and the math only works if most of them pay off. items.headline: Cathie Wood Buys 3.3 Million SpaceX Shares On IPO Day
items.summary: Cathie Wood's firm ARK Invest staked a large position in Elon Musk's SpaceX on Friday. The firm already has a huge chunk of Tesla stock.

items.headline: SpaceX's Nasdaq Debut Puts Bitcoin On 25% Of 'Mag8' Balance Sheets, Strategy’s Michael Saylor Says
items.summary: FTSE Russell confirmed SpaceX will join the Russell 1000 and Russell Top 200 on June 26, with MSCI adding it to its standard and large-cap indexes on June 29.
